subject: A massive ornate steampunk tank vehicle crammed with pipes, boilers, cannons, and purple electrical energy, parked inside a stone garage
description: A hulking tracked vehicle fills the frame, constructed from riveted copper and brass components — stacked boilers, pressure tanks, pipes, valves, a cage-like lantern housing, and multiple cannon ports. Purple electrical arcs crackle from a central containment unit. Tank treads dominate the lower body. The setting is a dim stone-walled workshop or garage with tall windows admitting grey light. No crew or driver is visible. The overall palette is warm copper and brass against cool purple electrical glow and grey stone.
foreground: enormous copper-brass steam-powered tracked vehicle with purple energy arcs
background: stone workshop interior with grey windows
emotion: imposing, industrious menace — a machine built to do brutal work
